examples: In his room, Zech set up a cubby.
We talk to an unborn baby, we massage their gestational cubby-house, and we even play music to them.
It's a standard lamp when open, a nigh light when closed and ACTS as a cubby for your desk supplies.
Cubbsters are given 1GB of additional space every time they refer a friend into Cubby.
Until then he must content himself with a cubby-hole in the commission building and a borrowed secretary.
